fields.name: Row No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that identifies the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the VAT statement line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what the VAT statement line will include.

fields.name: Account Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account interval or a series of account numbers.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Row Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies a row-number interval or a series of row numbers.

fields.name: Amount Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the VAT statement line shows the VAT amounts or the base amounts on which the VAT is calculated.

fields.name: Calculate with
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether amounts on the VAT statement will be calculated with their original sign or with the sign reversed.

fields.name: Print
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the VAT statement line will be printed on the report that contains the finished VAT statement.

fields.name: Print with
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether amounts on the VAT statement will be printed with their original sign or with the sign reversed.

fields.name: New Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a new page should begin immediately after this line when the VAT statement is printed. To start a new page after this line, place a check mark in the field.

fields.name: Tax Jurisdiction Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a tax jurisdiction code for the statement.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to use only entries from the VAT Entry table that are marked as Use Tax to be totaled on this line.

fields.name: Box No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number on the box that the VAT statement applies to.
